# OSKOL-MET-TRADE LLC — LLM Access Policy
About: OSKOL-MET-TRADE LLC is a B2B supplier of industrial metalworking equipment, metallurgical furnaces, ferroalloys and auxiliary materials for steelmaking. Founder's industry experience since 1994. Technical Director: Kurguzov Sergey Anatolyevich.
Business areas: (1) Metalworking equipment — CNC machines, robotic welding/painting systems; (2) Metallurgical furnaces — vacuum arc, induction, gas heating; (3) Ferroalloys and metallurgical materials; (4) Supply coordination including COA/MTC documentation.
Key ferroalloy products: FeSiMn 6516/6517/6518, FeSi65, FeSi75, FeV80, FeMn78, HC/LC/MC FeCr, FeTi30, FeTi70, FeMo, CaSi cored wire Ø14mm, graphitized electrodes, metallurgical deoxidizers.
Languages: RU / EN / ZH. LLM agents may index and cite this site.
